content: I was at my farmhouse in Ballabhgarh from 2:00 PM to 7:00 PM on October 15. My wife, Priya, and two guests, Rajiv and Ankit, can confirm. I didn’t know about the kidnapping until the news broke. I haven’t spoken to Vikram in over a year. I have no motive. I didn’t send any messages. I don’t even know how to use encrypted apps. My phone was stolen two days before — I reported it to the police on October 13. I don’t know why my phone’s signal was near Sector 57. I didn’t go there. I swear on my son’s life.
